metadata.description: A method library of Agent Skills for AI-agent-driven work, organised by direction: coding (development-process discipline for coding agents — plan, build, gate), ai-os (the headless AI assisting system — job archetypes, wiki onboarding and maintenance), and productivity (individual AI-assisted work — starting with an AI-writing audit). Shared by interactive Claude Code / Cowork sessions and automated pipelines.

plugins.name: coding
plugins.description: Development-process skills for coding agents: agent-tiered-planning, design-direction-lock, implementation-discipline, adversarial-review — plan, build, and gate a change across a mixed-capability agent pool.

plugins.name: ai-os
plugins.description: Framework + Agent Skills for a headless AI assisting system over real folders: project-onboarding, wiki-onboarding, wiki-maintenance, user-onboarding.

plugins.name: productivity
plugins.description: Skills for individual AI-assisted knowledge work. First skill: ai-writing-audit — check a draft for the signs of AI authorship (clustered tells, monotone rhythm, leaked citation markup) and rewrite so it reads as human.
